name: Easy Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large roasting pan with cooking spray.
2. Add the popped corn to the pan and keep warm in an oven set to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a heavy, 2-quart saucepan, combine corn syrup, sugar, and salt.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a boil.
5. Continue cooking without stirring for 10 minutes or until the temperature reaches 290 degrees Fahrenheit on a candy thermometer.
6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
7. Slowly pour the mixture over the popcorn, stirring to coat evenly.
8. Cool the popcorn by stirring until it can be handled with your hands.
9. Spray your hands with cooking spray.
10. Quickly shape the popcorn into 3-inch balls.
